selection_rule: Every guardrail-validated proposal produced by the run_corpus.py pipeline under SELFGRAPH_OBJECTTYPE_MATCH=relaxed (same ingest, same extract, same generate_goal_set, same order). Each promotion runs in a Runtime.fork taken at the moment of the proposal's validation; forks share the SQLite file but use distinct run_ids so they neither see each other nor mutate the main pipeline graph.
